items.title: AI Data Center Growth: Challenges and Opportunities for Electric Power Systems
items.source_label: electric utilities load growth AI data centers

ai.summary: Based on the title metadata, the video examines how the expansion of AI data centers creates both challenges and opportunities for electric power systems. It targets professionals involved in grid planning, utilities, EPCs, and high‑density data center power delivery.

Frames both challenges and opportunities for grid operators and suppliers
Audience: grid planners, utilities, EPCs, data center power and energy infrastructure teams
No transcript or description available; summary derived from title metadata
takeaways: Track AI data center project pipelines and incorporate potential new loads into capacity and interconnection planning
Assess options for flexibility and resilience (e.g., demand response, storage, on‑site generation) to accommodate high‑density loads
Engage early with developers, utilities, and EPCs to align technical requirements, timelines, and procurement
Include AI data center growth scenarios in long‑term transmission, distribution and procurement planning
